_notes: Copy the mcpServers block into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (Mac)
Replace every /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO placeholder with your real folder path.
Fill in your real API keys — never commit this file with real secrets.
TRACKER_USE_DB=1 enables SQLite tracking (recommended). DB lands at TRACKER_DB_PATH.
OUTPUT_DIR is NOT used by this project — omit it.
LLM routing supports OPENAI_API_KEY and/or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY via LLM_PROVIDER (auto|openai|anthropic).
